title: Synchronize visible app title and in-app diagnostic metadata with development metadata
summary: Update the visible application title, document title, embedded FILE_META and HADO_BUILD_INFO values used by copied diagnostic logs, and expose type-score execution trace in diagnostic snapshot so preview verification reflects the loaded Update07.1 scoring implementation.
requirements: Preserve external hado_type_score.js responsibility separation; do not inline scoring logic into HTML.
Update the browser document title to include the current Update number: 覇道ライブラリ 3.0.0.0 Update07.2.
Update the visible app title/header version label to include the current Update number: 覇道ライブラリ 3.0.0.0 Update07.2.
Update embedded FILE_META and HADO_BUILD_INFO diagnostic values from stale Update02 to Update07.2.
Add a lightweight typeScore diagnostic snapshot when the score module evaluates a candidate, including algorithm version, score, conditionalMaxScore, matched metric count, and contribution summary.
Keep HTML growth minimal and avoid duplicating scoring logic.
Update HADO_DEV_INFO.json to displayVersion 3.0.0.0 Update07.2 after applying.
Run regression tests and preview sync verification.
acceptanceCriteria: Browser tab title displays 覇道ライブラリ 3.0.0.0 Update07.2.
Visible app title/header displays 覇道ライブラリ 3.0.0.0 Update07.2.
Copied debug log no longer reports Update02 as current Build Info.
Copied debug log contains typeScore execution trace after running 型編成ナビ or 型候補一覧.
Preview repository receives the same files automatically.
